name: viva-social-organizer-root
description: Root scripts for VivaTech Social Organizer (Flutter Web + Firebase Hosting + Functions).

scripts.build:flutter: flutter build web --release > /tmp/flutter-web-build.log 2>&1 || { echo '--- flutter build failed (snap stdout-pipe workaround); log below ---'; cat /tmp/flutter-web-build.log; exit 1; }
